title: Hakko FX601 Portable Soldering Iron - Dial Temperature Control 240 to 540C 46W - Interchangeable Tip - Ideal for Electronics Soldering, Stained Glass Soldering, High Power Soldering 230V UK Plug
features: POPULAR - Highly popular soldering iron across Asia and the USA, Hakko have now CE certified the FX-601 for sale in UK/Europe. Light weight, portable soldering iron – mains powered with a UK plug.

DURABLE - High Quality Japanese Design, is designed and built to last a life time, not just a year like cheaper options. Ideal for hobbyists such as stained glass workers or for traditional electronics soldering, the FX601 soldering iron brings professional reliability and quality to a portable easy to use iron.

DIAL CONTROL – Simple to operate dial temperature control with settings from 240 to 540ºC with the option to lock temperature setting. Highly versatile soldering iron suitable for soldering a wide range of applications.

CERAMIC HEATING – Highly efficient heating element, heats more evenly and more quickly than Nichrome Heaters used in many cheap competitor units. Temperature control sensor in heater ensures consistent heat & FAST thermal recovery offering professional soldering station reliability in a handy iron.

TIP OPTIONS – Standard soldering tip included is optimal for soldering work where a high amount of heat is required such as stained glass, electronics chassis, large connector, transformer etc. Large range of other T19 optional tips available to purchase separately, T18 Tips with a further 31 varieties also available if used with conversion pipe B3469.
description: From the manufacturer For over 60 years, Hakko Corporation has been producing superior quality soldering and de-soldering tools, hot air rework stations, smoke and fume extraction systems and a wide assortment of accessories and related equipment for the electronics, industrial and hobby industries. Designed and manufactured in Japan, Hakko tools are precision engineered for quality and reliability, you can trust the Hakko brand to go the extra mile. Always ensure your purchase is a genuine Hakko product. FX-601 Soldering Iron with Dial Control High power soldering iron ideal for hobbyists or professionals The Hakko FX601 packs a powerful punch, boasting 46W of power to rival many competitor soldering irons and stations. Supplied with a large, 6.5mm wide, T19-D65 soldering iron tip as standard it is an ideal iron for any hobbyist or mobile electronics technician. The FX601 utilises a Ceramic heater, heating more quickly and evenly than the Nichrome heaters used in many competitor units. This listing is manufactured specifically for the UK / Ireland British 230V, 50Hz Power Supply & BS 3-pin Plug 46W AC 26V 240 to 540ºC Temperature range Ceramic heater Soldering Iron and Tip Included FX-650 FX-601 FX-888D FX-951 FM-203 FM-204 Add To Basket Add To Basket Buying Options Buying Options Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 3.7 out of 5 stars 17 4.7 out of 5 stars 61 4.6 out of 5 stars 386 4.6 out of 5 stars 40 3.7 out of 5 stars 4 5.0 out of 5 stars 2 Price £30.46 £ 30 . 46 £165.50 £ 165 . 50 — no data — no data £521.02 £ 521 . 02 £823.37 £ 823 . 37 Primary Function Soldering Iron Soldering Iron Soldering Station Soldering Station Multi-Purpose Desoldering Station Tool Included as standard: Soldering Iron + Tip Soldering Iron + Tip Soldering Iron + Tip Soldering Iron Soldering Iron Vacuum Desoldering Gun Standard Soldering Tips T34 (7 varieties) T19 (10 varieties) T18 (31 varieties) T15 Tips (91 Varieties) T15 Tips (91 Varieties) T15 Tips (91 Varieties) Power 16W 46W 70W 75W 140W 120W Channels n/a n/a 1 1 2 1 Soldering ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Heavy Duty Soldering No ✓ ✓ No ✓ No Micro-Soldering No No No ✓ ✓ No SMD Rework No No ✓ ✓ ✓ No Desoldering No No No No Yes (Requires Compressed Air) Yes (No Compressed Air Required)
